mapper.select:
SELECT DISTINCT (id), WORK_CLASS， DATE_EVOLVE, TOP_DATE_EVOLVE, COMPLETION_NODE, IS_KEYNO, WORK_TASKS, PERSON_LIABLE, IS_COMPLETION, CREATION_DATE, CONTENT FROM weekly where CREATION_DATE >= TO_DATE(#{sytime}, 'yyyy-MM-dd') and CREATION_DATE <=TO_DATE(#{outtime}, 'yyyy-MM-dd')
and TO_CHAR(DEPT_ID)=TO_CHAR(#{sql})
order by CREATION_DATE desc

SELECT DISTINCT (id), WORK_CLASS， DATE_EVOLVE, TOP_DATE_EVOLVE, COMPLETION_NODE, IS_KEYNO, WORK_TASKS, PERSON_LIABLE, IS_COMPLETION, CREATION_DATE, CONTENT FROM DYN_SON_WEEKLY where CREATION_DATE >= TO_DATE(#{sytime}, 'yyyy-MM-dd') and CREATION_DATE <=TO_DATE(#{outtime}, 'yyyy-MM-dd')
and TO_CHAR(DEPT_ID)=TO_CHAR(#{sql})
order by WORK_CLASS
SELECT NAME FROM SYS_USER where ID = #{ID}

SELECT * FROM ROLLING_PLAN where ROLLING_PLAN_DATE >= TO_DATE(#{sytime}, 'yyyy-MM') and ROLLING_PLAN_DATE <= TO_DATE(#{outtime}, 'yyyy-MM')
and TO_CHAR(DEPT_ID)=TO_CHAR(#{sql})
order by ROLLING_PLAN_DATE

SELECT
* FROM DYN_ROLLING_SON t1 LEFT JOIN DYN_MEEKLY t2 on t1.fk_sub_col_id = t2.id LEFT JOIN BPM_HIST_PROCINST t3 on t3.FORMID_ = t2.id where t3.BUSINESSSTATE_ = 'ended' and ROLLING_PLAN_DATE >= TO_DATE(#{sytime}, 'yyyy-MM-dd') and ROLLING_PLAN_DATE <= TO_DATE(#{outtime}, 'yyyy-MM-dd')
and TO_CHAR(DEPT_ID)=TO_CHAR(#{sql})
order by ROLLING_PLAN_DATE desc
mapper.insert:
insert into weekly
id,
created_by,
last_updated_by,
work_tasks,
person_liable,
fk_sub_col_id,
creation_date,
is_completion,
last_update_date,
top_date_evolve,
completion_node,
is_keyno,
date_evolve,
version,
created_dept,
org_identity,
work_class,
last_update_ip,
content,
#{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{createdBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{workTasks,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{personLiable,jdbcType=CLOB},
#{fkSubColId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{creationDate},
#{isCompletion,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{lastUpdateDate},
#{topDateEvolve,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{completionNode,jdbcType=DATE},
#{isKeyno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{dateEvolve,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{version,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
#{createdDept,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{orgIdentity,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{workClass,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{lastUpdateIp,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{content,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

insert into rolling_plan
id,
created_by,
last_updated_by,
fk_sub_col_id,
creation_date,
rolling_plan_content,
last_update_date,
rolling_plan_assignment,
rolling_plan_target,
version,
created_dept,
org_identity,
last_update_ip,
dept_id,
rolling_plandate,
rolling_plan_date,
#{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{createdBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{fkSubColId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{creationDate,jdbcType=DATE},
#{rollingPlanContent,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{lastUpdateDate,jdbcType=DATE},
#{rollingPlanAssignment,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{rollingPlanTarget,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{version,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
#{createdDept,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{orgIdentity,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{lastUpdateIp,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{deptId,jdbcType=CLOB},
#{rollingPlandate,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
TO_DATE(#{rollingPlanDate},'yyyy-mm-dd')
mapper.select: select * FROM DYN_MEEKLY where id = #{lsid}
mapper.update:
update dyn_meekly
id =#{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
created_by =#{createdBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
last_updated_by =#{lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
application_department =#{applicationDepartment,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
applicant =#{applicant,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
creation_date =#{creationDate},
last_update_date =#{lastUpdateDate},
form_no =#{formNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
version =version+1,
created_dept =#{createdDept,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
org_identity =#{orgIdentity,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
last_update_ip =#{lastUpdateIp,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
application_date =#{applicationDate,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
last_weekly =#{lastWeekly,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
last_yeek =#{lastYeek,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where id = #{id} and version =#{version}
mapper.select:
select t1.id , t1.created_by , t1.last_updated_by , t1.application_department , t1.applicant , t1.creation_date , t1.last_update_date , t1.form_no , t1.version , t1.created_dept , t1.org_identity , t1.last_update_ip , t1.application_date , t1.last_weekly , t1.last_yeek , t1.is_son, t2.BUSINESSSTATE_, t2.ID_ as lcid from dyn_meekly t1 LEFT JOIN BPM_HIST_PROCINST t2 ON t1.ID = t2.FORMID_
t1.IS_SON = #{is,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
and t1.applicant=(select name from SYS_USER where id = #{sysid})
and t1.ID =#{bean.id}
and t1.CREATED_BY like concat(concat('%',#{bean.createdBy}),'%')
and t1.LAST_UPDATED_BY like concat(concat('%',#{bean.lastUpdatedBy}),'%')
and t1.APPLICATION_DEPARTMENT like concat(concat('%',#{bean.applicationDepartment}),'%')
and t1.APPLICANT like concat(concat('%',#{bean.applicant}),'%')
and t1.CREATION_DATE like concat(concat('%',#{bean.creationDate}),'%')
and t1.LAST_UPDATE_DATE like concat(concat('%',#{bean.lastUpdateDate}),'%')
and t1.FORM_NO like concat(concat('%',#{bean.formNo}),'%')
and t1.VERSION like concat(concat('%',#{bean.version}),'%')
and t1.CREATED_DEPT like concat(concat('%',#{bean.createdDept}),'%')
and t1.ORG_IDENTITY like concat(concat('%',#{bean.orgIdentity}),'%')
and t1.LAST_UPDATE_IP like concat(concat('%',#{bean.lastUpdateIp}),'%')
and t1.APPLICATION_DATE like concat(concat('%',#{bean.applicationDate}),'%')
and t1.LAST_WEEKLY like concat(concat('%',#{bean.lastWeekly}),'%')
and t1.LAST_YEEK like concat(concat('%',#{bean.lastYeek}),'%')
and t1.IS_SON like concat(concat('%',#{bean.isSon}),'%')
and t1.ORG_IDENTITY = #{org}
order by ${pOrderBy}
order by t1.creation_date desc
mapper.insert:
insert into dyn_distribute
id,
created_by,
dept_id,
posen_id,
last_updated_by,
application_department,
last_weekly,
last_yeek,
applicant,
distribute_date,
creation_date,
last_update_date,
distribute_posen_id,
flow_path_id,
version,
created_dept,
org_identity,
last_update_ip,
application_date,
#{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{createdBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{deptId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{posenId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{applicationDepartment,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{lastWeekly,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{lastYeek,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{applicant,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{distributeDate,jdbcType=DATE},
#{creationDate},
#{lastUpdateDate},
#{distributePosenId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{flowPathId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{version,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
#{createdDept,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{orgIdentity,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{lastUpdateIp,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{applicationDate,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
mapper.select:
select t1.id , t1.created_by , t1.dept_id , t1.posen_id , t1.last_updated_by , t1.application_department , t1.last_weekly , t1.last_yeek , t1.applicant , t1.distribute_date , t1.creation_date , t1.last_update_date , t1.is_son , t1.distribute_posen_id , t1.flow_path_id , t1.version , t1.created_dept , t1.org_identity , t1.last_update_ip , t1.application_date from dyn_distribute t1
t1.posen_id = #{user}
and t1.ID =#{bean.id}
and t1.CREATED_BY like concat(concat('%',#{bean.createdBy}),'%')
and t1.DEPT_ID like concat(concat('%',#{bean.deptId}),'%')
and t1.POSEN_ID like concat(concat('%',#{bean.posenId}),'%')
and t1.LAST_UPDATED_BY like concat(concat('%',#{bean.lastUpdatedBy}),'%')
and t1.APPLICATION_DEPARTMENT like concat(concat('%',#{bean.applicationDepartment}),'%')
and t1.LAST_WEEKLY like concat(concat('%',#{bean.lastWeekly}),'%')
and t1.LAST_YEEK like concat(concat('%',#{bean.lastYeek}),'%')
and t1.APPLICANT like concat(concat('%',#{bean.applicant}),'%')
and t1.DISTRIBUTE_DATE >= #{bean.distributeDateBegin}
and t1.DISTRIBUTE_DATE <= #{bean.distributeDateEnd}
and t1.CREATION_DATE like concat(concat('%',#{bean.creationDate}),'%')
and t1.LAST_UPDATE_DATE like concat(concat('%',#{bean.lastUpdateDate}),'%')
and t1.IS_SON like concat(concat('%',#{bean.isSon}),'%')
and t1.DISTRIBUTE_POSEN_ID like concat(concat('%',#{bean.distributePosenId}),'%')
and t1.FLOW_PATH_ID like concat(concat('%',#{bean.flowPathId}),'%')
and t1.VERSION like concat(concat('%',#{bean.version}),'%')
and t1.CREATED_DEPT like concat(concat('%',#{bean.createdDept}),'%')
and t1.ORG_IDENTITY like concat(concat('%',#{bean.orgIdentity}),'%')
and t1.LAST_UPDATE_IP like concat(concat('%',#{bean.lastUpdateIp}),'%')
and t1.APPLICATION_DATE like concat(concat('%',#{bean.applicationDate}),'%')
and t1.ORG_IDENTITY =#{org}
order by ${pOrderBy}
order by t1.creation_date desc
select BUSINESSSTATE_ from BPM_HIST_PROCINST where FORMID_=#{lsid}

select ROLLING_PLAN_ASSIGNMENT from ROLLING_PLAN where ROLLING_PLAN_ASSIGNMENT = #{ASSIGNMENT} and CREATION_DATE >= TO_DATE(#{sytime},'yyyy-MM-dd') and CREATION_DATE <=TO_DATE(#{outtime}, 'yyyy-MM-dd')

select t1.id , t1.created_by , t1.last_updated_by , t1.work_tasks , t1.person_liable , t1.fk_sub_col_id , t1.creation_date , t1.is_completion , t1.last_update_date , t1.top_date_evolve , t1.completion_node , t1.is_keyno , t1.date_evolve , t1.version , t1.created_dept , t1.org_identity , t1.work_class , t1.last_update_ip , t1.dept_id , t1.content from weekly t1 LEFT JOIN DYN_MEEKLY t2 on t1.fk_sub_col_id = t2.id LEFT JOIN BPM_HIST_PROCINST t3 on t3.FORMID_ = t2.id
t3.BUSINESSSTATE_ = 'ended'
and t1.ID =#{bean.id}
and t1.CREATED_BY like concat(concat('%',#{bean.createdBy}),'%')
and t1.LAST_UPDATED_BY like concat(concat('%',#{bean.lastUpdatedBy}),'%')
and t1.WORK_TASKS like concat(concat('%',#{bean.workTasks}),'%')
and t1.PERSON_LIABLE like concat(concat('%',#{bean.personLiable}),'%')
and t1.FK_SUB_COL_ID like concat(concat('%',#{bean.fkSubColId}),'%')
and t1.CREATION_DATE like concat(concat('%',#{bean.creationDate}),'%')
and t1.IS_COMPLETION like concat(concat('%',#{bean.isCompletion}),'%')
and t1.LAST_UPDATE_DATE like concat(concat('%',#{bean.lastUpdateDate}),'%')
and t1.TOP_DATE_EVOLVE like concat(concat('%',#{bean.topDateEvolve}),'%')
and t1.COMPLETION_NODE >= #{bean.completionNodeBegin}
and t1.COMPLETION_NODE <= #{bean.completionNodeEnd}
and t1.IS_KEYNO like concat(concat('%',#{bean.isKeyno}),'%')
and t1.DATE_EVOLVE like concat(concat('%',#{bean.dateEvolve}),'%')
and t1.VERSION like concat(concat('%',#{bean.version}),'%')
and t1.CREATED_DEPT like concat(concat('%',#{bean.createdDept}),'%')
and t1.ORG_IDENTITY like concat(concat('%',#{bean.orgIdentity}),'%')
and t1.WORK_CLASS like concat(concat('%',#{bean.workClass}),'%')
and t1.LAST_UPDATE_IP like concat(concat('%',#{bean.lastUpdateIp}),'%')
and t1.CONTENT like concat(concat('%',#{bean.content}),'%')
order by ${pOrderBy}
order by t1.WORK_CLASS

select t1.id , t1.created_by , t1.last_updated_by , t1.work_tasks , t1.person_liable , t1.fk_sub_col_id , t1.creation_date , t1.is_completion , t1.last_update_date , t1.top_date_evolve , t1.completion_node , t1.is_keyno , t1.date_evolve , t1.version , t1.created_dept , t1.org_identity , t1.work_class , t1.last_update_ip , t1.dept_id , t1.content from weekly t1 LEFT JOIN DYN_MEEKLY t2 on t1.fk_sub_col_id = t2.id LEFT JOIN BPM_HIST_PROCINST t3 on t3.FORMID_ = t2.id
t3.BUSINESSSTATE_ = 'ended'
or t1.ID =#{bean.id}
or t1.CREATED_BY like concat(concat('%',#{bean.createdBy}),'%')
or t1.LAST_UPDATED_BY like concat(concat('%',#{bean.lastUpdatedBy}),'%')
and t1.WORK_TASKS like concat(concat('%',#{bean.workTasks}),'%')
or t1.PERSON_LIABLE like concat(concat('%',#{bean.personLiable}),'%')
or t1.FK_SUB_COL_ID like concat(concat('%',#{bean.fkSubColId}),'%')
or t1.CREATION_DATE like concat(concat('%',#{bean.creationDate}),'%')
or t1.IS_COMPLETION like concat(concat('%',#{bean.isCompletion}),'%')
or t1.LAST_UPDATE_DATE like concat(concat('%',#{bean.lastUpdateDate}),'%')
or t1.TOP_DATE_EVOLVE like concat(concat('%',#{bean.topDateEvolve}),'%')
or t1.COMPLETION_NODE >= #{bean.completionNodeBegin}
or t1.COMPLETION_NODE <= #{bean.completionNodeEnd}
or t1.IS_KEYNO like concat(concat('%',#{bean.isKeyno}),'%')
or t1.DATE_EVOLVE like concat(concat('%',#{bean.dateEvolve}),'%')
or t1.VERSION like concat(concat('%',#{bean.version}),'%')
or t1.CREATED_DEPT like concat(concat('%',#{bean.createdDept}),'%')
or t1.WORK_CLASS like concat(concat('%',#{bean.workClass}),'%')
or t1.LAST_UPDATE_IP like concat(concat('%',#{bean.lastUpdateIp}),'%')
or t1.CONTENT like concat(concat('%',#{bean.content}),'%')
order by ${pOrderBy}
order by t1.WORK_CLASS

SELECT distinct t1.rolling_plandate , t1.rolling_plan_date, t1.rolling_plan_content,t1.rolling_plan_assignment,t1.rolling_plan_target FROM rolling_plan t1 LEFT JOIN DYN_MEEKLY t2 on t1.fk_sub_col_id = t2.id LEFT JOIN BPM_HIST_PROCINST t3 on t3.FORMID_ = t2.id
t3.BUSINESSSTATE_ = 'ended'
and t1.ID =#{bean.id}
and t1.CREATED_BY like concat(concat('%',#{bean.createdBy}),'%')
and t1.LAST_UPDATED_BY like concat(concat('%',#{bean.lastUpdatedBy}),'%')
and t1.FK_SUB_COL_ID like concat(concat('%',#{bean.fkSubColId}),'%')
and t1.CREATION_DATE like concat(concat('%',#{bean.creationDate}),'%')
and t1.ROLLING_PLAN_CONTENT like concat(concat('%',#{bean.rollingPlanContent}),'%')
and t1.LAST_UPDATE_DATE like concat(concat('%',#{bean.lastUpdateDate}),'%')
and t1.ROLLING_PLAN_ASSIGNMENT like concat(concat('%',#{bean.rollingPlanAssignment}),'%')
and t1.ROLLING_PLAN_DATE >= TO_DATE(#{bean.rollingPlanDateBegin}, 'yyyy-MM')
and t1.ROLLING_PLAN_DATE <= ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(#{bean.rollingPlanDateEnd}, 'yyyy-MM'),1)
and t1.ROLLING_PLAN_TARGET like concat(concat('%',#{bean.rollingPlanTarget}),'%')
and t1.VERSION like concat(concat('%',#{bean.version}),'%')
and t1.CREATED_DEPT like concat(concat('%',#{bean.createdDept}),'%')
and t1.ORG_IDENTITY like concat(concat('%',#{bean.orgIdentity}),'%')
and t1.LAST_UPDATE_IP like concat(concat('%',#{bean.lastUpdateIp}),'%')
and t1.DEPT_ID like concat(concat('%',#{bean.deptId}),'%')
and t1.ROLLING_PLANDATE like concat(concat('%',#{bean.rollingPlandate}),'%')
order by ${pOrderBy}
order by t1.rolling_plan_date

SELECT distinct t1.rolling_plandate , t1.rolling_plan_date, t1.rolling_plan_content,t1.rolling_plan_assignment,t1.rolling_plan_target FROM rolling_plan t1 LEFT JOIN DYN_MEEKLY t2 on t1.fk_sub_col_id = t2.id LEFT JOIN BPM_HIST_PROCINST t3 on t3.FORMID_ = t2.id
t3.BUSINESSSTATE_ = 'ended'
or t1.ID =#{bean.id}
or t1.CREATED_BY like concat(concat('%',#{bean.createdBy}),'%')
or t1.LAST_UPDATED_BY like concat(concat('%',#{bean.lastUpdatedBy}),'%')
or t1.FK_SUB_COL_ID like concat(concat('%',#{bean.fkSubColId}),'%')
or t1.CREATION_DATE like concat(concat('%',#{bean.creationDate}),'%')
or t1.ROLLING_PLAN_CONTENT like concat(concat('%',#{bean.rollingPlanContent}),'%')
or t1.LAST_UPDATE_DATE like concat(concat('%',#{bean.lastUpdateDate}),'%')
and t1.ROLLING_PLAN_ASSIGNMENT like concat(concat('%',#{bean.rollingPlanAssignment}),'%')
or t1.ROLLING_PLAN_DATE >= TO_DATE(#{substr(bean.rollingPlanDateBegin}, 'yyyy-MM-dd')
or t1.ROLLING_PLAN_DATE <= ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(#{bean.rollingPlanDateEnd}, 'yyyy-MM-dd'),1)
or t1.ROLLING_PLAN_TARGET like concat(concat('%',#{bean.rollingPlanTarget}),'%')
or t1.VERSION like concat(concat('%',#{bean.version}),'%')
or t1.CREATED_DEPT like concat(concat('%',#{bean.createdDept}),'%')
or t1.LAST_UPDATE_IP like concat(concat('%',#{bean.lastUpdateIp}),'%')
or t1.DEPT_ID like concat(concat('%',#{bean.deptId}),'%')
or t1.ROLLING_PLANDATE like concat(concat('%',#{bean.rollingPlandate}),'%')
order by ${pOrderBy}
order by t1.rolling_plan_date desc
mapper.delete: delete from dyn_distribute where FLOW_PATH_ID = #{id} and POSEN_ID = #{user}
mapper.select:
SELECT ID
FROM SYS_USER where NAME = #{username}
mapper.insert:
insert into dyn_son_weekly
id,
created_by,
dept_id,
last_updated_by,
work_tasks,
person_liable,
fk_sub_col_id,
creation_date,
is_completion,
last_update_date,
top_date_evolve,
completion_node,
is_keyno,
date_evolve,
version,
created_dept,
org_identity,
work_class,
last_update_ip,
content,
#{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{createdBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{deptId,jdbcType=CLOB},
#{lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{workTasks,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{personLiable,jdbcType=CLOB},
#{fkSubColId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{creationDate},
#{isCompletion,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{lastUpdateDate},
#{topDateEvolve,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{completionNode,jdbcType=DATE},
#{isKeyno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{dateEvolve,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{version,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
#{createdDept,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{orgIdentity,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{workClass,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{lastUpdateIp,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{content,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
mapper.select: SELECT t1.LOOKUP_CODE FROM SYS_LOOKUP_TL t LEFT JOIN SYS_LOOKUP t1 on t.SYS_LOOKUP_ID=t1.ID where t.LOOKUP_NAME = #{lookup_name}

SELECT WEEKLY_SEARCH, WEEKLY_PROCESS, WEEKLY_PLAN_SEARCH, WEEKLY_DELETE_SON, WEEKLY_DISTRIBUTE, WEEKLY_SEARCH_SON, WEEKLY_PLAN_SEARCH_SON, WEEKLY_DELETE, WEEKLY_PROCESSS_SON , WEEKLY_DISTRIBUTE_POSEN FROM DYN_TYPE WHERE ROWNUM =1
mapper.insert:
insert into dyn_type
id,
created_by,
last_updated_by,
weekly_search,
weekly_process,
weekly_plan_search,
weekly_delete_son,
creation_date,
last_update_date,
weekly_distribute,
weekly_search_son,
weekly_plan_search_son,
version,
created_dept,
org_identity,
weekly_delete,
last_update_ip,
weekly_processs_son,
WEEKLY_DISTRIBUTE_POSEN,
#{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{createdBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{weeklySearch,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{weeklyProcess,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{weeklyPlanSearch,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{weeklyDeleteSon,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{creationDate},
#{lastUpdateDate},
#{weeklyDistribute,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{weeklySearchSon,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{weeklyPlanSearchSon,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{version,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
#{createdDept,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{orgIdentity,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{weeklyDelete,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{lastUpdateIp,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{weeklyProcesssSon,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{weeklyDistributePosen,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
mapper.update: update dyn_type set weekly_search =#{weeklySearch,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, weekly_process =#{weeklyProcess,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, weekly_plan_search =#{weeklyPlanSearch,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, weekly_delete_son =#{weeklyDeleteSon,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, weekly_distribute =#{weeklyDistribute,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, weekly_search_son =#{weeklySearchSon,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, weekly_plan_search_son =#{weeklyPlanSearchSon,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, weekly_delete =#{weeklyDelete,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, weekly_processs_son =#{weeklyProcesssSon,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, WEEKLY_DISTRIBUTE_POSEN =#{weeklyDistributePosen,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.select: select LAST_WEEKLY from DYN_MEEKLY where LAST_WEEKLY like concat(concat('%',#{yeer}),'%')
select id from (select id from dyn_meekly where applicant = ( select name from sys_user where id = #{sysid} ) and is_son = 2 order by creation_date desc ) where rownum = 1
select * from DYN_SON_WEEKLY where fk_SUB_COL_ID = #{id}
